svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1504px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
